project_info.title: FlashFix: Turning Units Faster, Getting Paid Sooner

outline.title: FlashFix: Turning Units Faster, Getting Paid Sooner
outline.summary: Title slide introducing FlashFix as the all-in-one platform for property turnover, cutting time from 7-14 days to 48 hours and eliminating coordination chaos.

outline.title: Property Turnover is Broken: $5K-$15K Cost Per Unit
outline.summary: Current state analysis showing the pain of manual coordination, lost revenue from vacant units ($50-$200/day), and the $50B+ annual turnover spend market.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/webdev-static-assets/flashfix-property-turnover.jpg - The image visually represents a vacant unit ready for turnover, with tools and supplies, directly illustrating the 'Problem' of property turnover.

outline.title: $29B Property Management Market Growing 9.7% CAGR
outline.summary: Market sizing: $29B TAM in 2026 growing to $61B by 2034. SAM of $3-5B in turnover segment. SOM of $50-100M by Year 5 with comparable exits like AppFolio at $5B+.

outline.title: One Platform, Three Portals, Zero Coordination Chaos
outline.summary: FlashFix unifies Admin, Property Manager, and Contractor portals with instant quote builder, real-time job tracking, photo documentation, and immutable audit log.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/webdev-static-assets/flashfix-hero-bg.jpg - The image of a command center with multiple screens displaying data and dashboards perfectly aligns with the 'FlashFix Unifies the Entire Turnover Workflow' and the 'Industrial command center aesthetic' mentioned in the slide content.

outline.title: Build Complete Turnover Quotes in Under 2 Minutes
outline.summary: 24 pre-loaded services across 9 categories. Real example: full turnover reset for $1,499 (drywall, paint, faucet, lock, smoke detector). Contractors see jobs instantly on mobile.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/webdev-static-assets/flashfix-dashboard-preview.jpg - The image displays a dashboard with property statuses, including 'Needs Turnover' and 'In Progress', which directly relates to the 'Product Demo - The Quote Builder in Action' and tracking property readiness.

outline.title: Contractors Complete Jobs 40% Faster with Clear Checklists
outline.summary: Mobile app shows task checklist with photo capture, real-time progress tracking, GPS data, and timestamps. Property managers see live progress; admins see full audit trail.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/webdev-static-assets/flashfix-contractor-app.jpg - The image shows a mobile phone with a 'Turnover Checklist' and 'Tasks Completed' progress, directly illustrating 'Real-Time Job Tracking' and the contractor's mobile app.

outline.title: MVP Built, Live, and Ready to Sell
outline.summary: Fully functional MVP deployed with 3 role-based portals, quote builder, job tracking, pricing catalog, audit log, and analytics. No traction required yet—product speaks for itself.

outline.title: Three Revenue Streams: Subscription + Marketplace + Licensing
outline.summary: Subscription: Starter $99/mo, Professional $249/mo, Enterprise $699/mo. Marketplace: 5% commission on contractor jobs. White-label licensing: $5K-$50K one-time. 40% gross margin.

outline.title: Land Fast: Target Mid-Market Property Managers First
outline.summary: Phase 1: 10-20 beta customers (50-500 unit portfolios). Phase 2: 100+ customers, $50K+ MRR via content and referrals. Phase 3: Enterprise expansion. CAC $500-$1K, 3-4 month payback.

outline.title: Path to $1M ARR by Year 2: Conservative Growth Model
outline.summary: Year 1: $594K ARR (75 customers). Year 2: $1.02M ARR (250+ customers). Year 3: $2.1M ARR (500+ customers). 70% gross margin, -20% operating margin Year 1, 10% by Year 3.

outline.title: $500K Seed Round: Product, Sales, Operations
outline.summary: Product & Engineering 40% ($200K), Sales & Marketing 35% ($175K), Operations 15% ($75K). 18-month runway to profitability with conservative growth.

outline.title: Perfect Storm: Labor Shortage, Digital Transformation, Investor Demand
outline.summary: Post-COVID digital adoption accelerating. Labor shortage forcing automation. Investor pressure for faster ROI (48-hour turnovers = 15% higher returns). ESG compliance mandatory.
